title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and deploy production ML systems including recommendation engines and NLP pipelines. Stack includes Python, PyTorch, Kubernetes, and AWS SageMaker.
requirements: Strong Python. Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow. ML fundamentals. Experience deploying models. Docker and CI/CD. BS/MS in CS or related.
nice_to_have: Transformer architectures. MLOps tools. Published research.

title: Registered Nurse - ICU
description: Provide critical care to patients in our 30-bed ICU. Collaborate with physicians, respiratory therapists, and support staff to deliver evidence-based care.
requirements: Active RN license in New York. BSN required. 2+ years ICU or critical care experience. ACLS and BLS certifications. Strong clinical assessment skills.
nice_to_have: CCRN certification. Experience with ventilator management. Charge nurse experience. Bilingual (Spanish).

title: Marketing Manager
description: Lead our growth marketing team. Own acquisition strategy across paid social, email, SEO, and partnerships. Report directly to VP Marketing.
requirements: 3+ years in growth or performance marketing. Hands-on with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and email platforms. Data-driven with strong Excel/analytics skills. Track record of scaling campaigns profitably.
nice_to_have: E-commerce experience. Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar. Budget management over $500K. Team leadership.

title: High School Math Teacher
description: Teach Algebra II, Pre-Calculus, and AP Statistics to 9th-12th graders. Create engaging lessons, assess student progress, and collaborate with department team.
requirements: State teaching license in Mathematics. Bachelor's degree in Math or Education. Classroom management skills. Ability to differentiate instruction. Pass background check.
nice_to_have: Master's in Education. AP certification. Experience with IEP accommodations. Bilingual (Spanish). EdTech tools experience.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Join our investment banking division to build financial models, conduct valuation analysis, and prepare client presentations for M&A transactions.
requirements: Bachelor's in Finance, Economics, or Accounting. Strong Excel modeling skills. Understanding of DCF, comps, and LBO analysis. Attention to detail. Strong communication.
nice_to_have: CFA Level 1 passed. Prior internship in banking or consulting. Bloomberg terminal experience. SQL or Python.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Build features for our merchant platform used by millions. Work across React frontend and Ruby/Node.js backend services.
requirements: Proficiency in React and Node.js or Ruby. Database design (PostgreSQL). REST APIs and GraphQL. Testing and CI/CD. Strong communication.
nice_to_have: E-commerce experience. TypeScript. Performance optimization. Mentoring junior devs.

title: Occupational Therapist
description: Evaluate and treat patients with physical, cognitive, and developmental challenges. Develop individualized treatment plans and document progress.
requirements: Master's in Occupational Therapy. Active OT license in California. NBCOT certification. Experience with diverse patient populations. Strong documentation skills.
nice_to_have: Pediatric experience. Hand therapy certification. Bilingual. Experience with electronic health records (Epic).

title: Account Executive - SaaS
description: Own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close for mid-market accounts. Sell our CRM and marketing platform to growing businesses.
requirements: 2+ years in B2B SaaS sales. Experience with full-cycle selling. CRM proficiency (Salesforce or HubSpot). Track record of meeting or exceeding quota. Strong presentation skills.
nice_to_have: MEDDIC or Challenger methodology. MarTech industry knowledge. Multilingual.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Create visual content for digital campaigns, social media, packaging, and retail displays. Work closely with brand marketing and product teams.
requirements: Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign). Strong portfolio showing range. Understanding of typography and layout. Ability to work on multiple projects simultaneously.
nice_to_have: Motion graphics (After Effects). 3D rendering. Figma. Apparel or sports brand experience.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze user behavior data to drive product decisions. Build dashboards, run A/B tests, and present findings to product and engineering teams.
requirements: Strong SQL skills. Python or R for analysis. Experience with BI tools (Tableau, Looker, or similar). Statistical thinking. Communication skills to translate data into insights.
nice_to_have: Experience with experimentation platforms. Knowledge of streaming/music industry. dbt. BigQuery or Snowflake.

title: Electrician - Journeyman
description: Install, maintain, and repair electrical systems in commercial buildings. Read blueprints, ensure code compliance, and mentor apprentices.
requirements: Journeyman Electrician license. 3+ years commercial electrical experience. Knowledge of NEC codes. Blueprint reading. OSHA 30 certification.
nice_to_have: Master Electrician license. Low-voltage and fire alarm experience. Solar installation. Foreman experience.

title: Human Resources Coordinator
description: Support the HR team with recruiting coordination, onboarding, benefits administration, and employee relations. First point of contact for employee HR questions.
requirements: Bachelor's in HR, Business, or related. Familiarity with HRIS systems. Strong organizational skills. Confidentiality and professionalism. Excel proficiency.
nice_to_have: SHRM-CP certification. Experience with Workday. Recruiting experience. Bilingual.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense medications, counsel patients, administer immunizations, and manage pharmacy operations. Ensure compliance with federal and state regulations.
requirements: Doctor of Pharmacy (PharmD). Active Florida pharmacist license. Immunization certified. Strong clinical knowledge. Patient-facing communication skills.
nice_to_have: Retail pharmacy experience. Bilingual (Spanish). MTM experience. Leadership or management experience.

title: Content Writer
description: Write blog posts, product copy, email campaigns, and social media content. Collaborate with SEO, design, and product marketing teams.
requirements: Excellent writing and editing skills. SEO fundamentals. Ability to adapt tone for different audiences. Portfolio of published work. Comfortable with content management systems.
nice_to_have: B2B SaaS writing experience. Video scripting. Basic HTML. Analytics tools (GA4).

title: Project Manager - Construction
description: Manage commercial construction projects from pre-construction through closeout. Coordinate subcontractors, track budgets, and ensure safety compliance.
requirements: 3+ years in construction project management. Proficiency with Procore or similar PM software. Budget and schedule management. Strong communication with field teams and clients.
nice_to_have: PMP certification. LEED accreditation. Experience with projects over $10M. OSHA 30.
